description:
How to get all the Claude Code goodness without having to leave Neovim.

# The blog post
https://ul.live/ytccneovim

# Commands

SPACE-ff (find files in neovim)
SPACE-bb (move to the next buffer)

# Ghostty Config: Navigate between panes (vim-style)
keybind = ctrl+h=goto_split:left
keybind = ctrl+j=goto_split:bottom
keybind = ctrl+k=goto_split:top
keybind = ctrl+l=goto_split:right
fulltitle: Claude Code + Neovim via Ghostty Panes
